name: ai-chat-vault
description: Compact Chrome MV3 extension for exporting ChatGPT conversations as Markdown.

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode content && vite build --mode popup && node scripts/verify-popup-bundle.mjs
scripts.verify: npm test && npm run build && npm run package && node scripts/verify-extension-runtime.mjs
scripts.package: npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs && node scripts/verify-extension-runtime.mjs
